titleStmt.title: SII 27.351: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 351. (A.R. No. 340 of 1931-32.) BOMMĀRUBEṬṬU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: It records a gift of rice for worship, offerings, burning a perpetual lamp and feeding brahmins on festival days in the maṭha of god Janārdana-mūrti by Kela-heggaḍa Mañjuseṭṭi of Bammara-beṭṭu. The said maṭha was caused to be built by Pāṇḍi-sāvanta.

It is dated the cyclic year Viśvāvasu, Dakshiṇāyana, Siṁha 15, Ashṭami, Sunday. On palaeographical grounds the record may be assigned to the 14th-15th century. The details do not tally in any of the given cyclic year occuring in the period.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Each line commences with a cypher.
div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ nirvighnamastu cakraṁ yasya bhujaṁgamē taṁ vidha
rājatē . śaṁbhō yasya virājatē karataḷē saṁ caṁdra prabhā
yasya tilakau nīlōtpa parārddha vikrama
gatistrailōkya nāthōhari[ḥ *.] viśvāvasu saṁvatsarada dakṣiṇāya
nada siṁhamāsa 15 neya Aṣṭamiyu Ādivāradalu śrīmatu kilahega
ḍeyarāda maṁjuseṭṭiyaru baṁmarubeṭṭinalli bāḷuvakāladali pāṁḍisāvaṁ
daru kaṭṭisidaṁthā maṭhadali pratiṣṭisida janārddana mūrtige taṁnamūla sarvvaThe letter dali are engraved above the line.
svadiṁda māḍidadharṁma nayivēdya naṁdaḷaka nityacatra sōṇidharṁma hasuvina
dharṁma muruvārte yeṁbivara śāsanadakramaveṁteṁdare yibbaraḍiga
ḷu naḍasuva nayivēdya 10 ne Akki yidakke naḍadubaha nālvattaramūḍe 82
nitya naḍava naṁdaḷaka 2 ke naḍadu baha Akkimūḍe 37 nityacatra dina 1 kke 12
maṁdiya Uṭakke kālāvadhige naḍadu baha Akki mūḍe 111 sōṇi dharṁ
ma dina 1 kke 24 maṁdi yidakke naḍadu baha Akki mūḍe 20 haguvi
na dharṁma dina 1kke 24 maṁdiya Uṭakke naḍadubaha Akki mūḍe 20 tiṁ
gaḷu hōma cautige 1 hāne tuppa śaṣṭige 3 teṁgutuppa I hō mada dravya saha
naḍadubaha Akki mūḍe 20 sōṇitiṁgaḷu mahā caurtti śaṣṭige 4 divasa
kke tuppa 13 hāne tuppa I hōmada dravya saha naḍadu baha Ayivattara Akki mū
ḍe 12 Adivasakkavārige Ayivattara Akki mūḍe 12 dēvara mugumavārte nā
lvattarali Akkimūḍe 56 hoṁnakka nāyakkitti Amavāse dvādaśi dharṁma
kkemāḍida Akkimūḍe 3 hāne 10 dvādaśiya dharṁmakke kāḷumāḍida A
kkiyamūḍe 1 maṁjuseṭṭiyaru Amāvāse dvādaśi dharmmakke mā
ḍida Akkimūḍe 5 sālibaḷi baggaseṭṭi haguvina tiṁgaḷu dvādaśige hōma
kke Avārigū saha naḍadu baha Akki mū 4 hoṁnaka nāyakiti mā
ḍida dharṁma nityanaḍava nayivēdya 4 kuḍiti Akkiya muḷuka Idakke na
ḍadubaha Akkiyamūḍe 19 Anaṁta Aḍiyaṁtava māḍida dharṁma
hōma 4 kko Amavāseya dharṁmako saha naḍadu baha Akki mūḍe 5
hāne 15 I maṭhada dhaṁmmakke naḍadu bahudu Aṁtu nālvattarali Akki
Akkimūḍe 414 hāne 15 yī maṭhada dharmava bāḷisuvava baṁmara beṭṭinali
bāḷuvava kaṭṭu meṭi naḍasuvanu I dharmmakke nāḷenavanāgali
mattobbanāgali bādisidare Avane nilisūda tānē dharṁmava ke
ḍisidare Ayidu beṭṭina dēsigaḷu nilisūdu dēvarige dēśakku I
du kaṭṭu Adaroḷage tanage śakyavallade yiddāga Ayinūrāḷa ko
ḍe hēḷōdu Ā Āyinūrāḷu ṣāvirāḷu sahavāgi yidharmava bāḷi
sudu Idaroḷage Iṁdinavanāgali nāḷenavanāgali mattobbanāgali Idhaṁ
rmmava bāḷisadavarige vāraṇāsiyalli sāvira kavile koṁda dōśa . Ā
ditya caṁdrāvanilōnalauca dyaurbhūmirāpōu hrudayaṁ manaśca Aha
śca rātriśca Ubhayēca saṁdhyē dharṁmmasya jānāti narasyavrittiṁ . mallayyana
baraha saṁkumaga Abbayya tiddiddu
Digital edition of SII 27.351 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
